title: Little Miss Muffet
content:
Little Miss Muffet
                        Sat on a tuffet
                    Eating of curds and whey;



                        There came a big Spider
                        And sat down beside her,
                    And frightened Miss Muffet away.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Leonard Leslie Brooke, titled "Little Miss Muffet", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
